middle-east.name: Middle East
middle-east.description: World-class diving in the Red Sea and Persian Gulf

egypt.name: Egypt
egypt.description: Red Sea mecca: Ras Mohammed, Brothers, and Thistlegorm wreck.
egypt.bestTime: In the Red Sea, June and September offer the calmest seas and clearest water, with temperatures ranging from brisk 17°C to warmer 28°C. Along the Mediterranean coast, similar conditions prevail during June and September, with water warming to 27–28°C.

red-sea.name: Red Sea
red-sea.description: Legendary for its coral reefs, wrecks, and clear warm waters, spanning Egypt, Sudan, Jordan, Israel, and Saudi Arabia.

eritrea.name: Eritrea
eritrea.bestTime: May presents the calmest seas and clearest water, with water temperatures around a warm 27°C. A solitary month to dive when conditions align perfectly.

northern-red-sea-region.name: Northern Red Sea Region
northern-red-sea-region.description: Diving in Northern Red Sea Region.

southern-red-sea-region.name: Southern Red Sea Region
southern-red-sea-region.description: Diving in Southern Red Sea Region.

israel.name: Israel
israel.description: Eilat's easy-access Red Sea diving and vibrant reefs.

jordan.name: Jordan
jordan.description: Aqaba's coral reefs and wrecks at the tip of the Red Sea.
jordan.bestTime: June sees Jordan's seas at their calmest, with the clearest water and driest conditions, and water temperatures ranging from 27–28°C. March–June and September–November also offer favorable diving periods.

kuwait.name: Kuwait
kuwait.bestTime: August to September offers the calmest seas and driest months in Kuwait, with water temperatures soaring to a warm 33–34°C.

oman.name: Oman
oman.description: Fjords, whale sharks, and rich macro life in the Arabian Sea.
oman.bestTime: Dive the Arabian Sea in May or October to November for calmest seas and clearest water; in the Persian Gulf, similar conditions prevail in May and September to October.

al-batinah-north-governorate.name: Al Batinah North Governorate
al-batinah-north-governorate.description: Diving in Al Batinah North Governorate.

qatar.name: Qatar
qatar.bestTime: From January to May, enjoy the clearest waters and calmest seas, with water temperatures around a brisk 20°C early in the year.

saudi-arabia.name: Saudi Arabia
saudi-arabia.description: Untouched Red Sea reefs, liveaboards, and new dive frontiers.
saudi-arabia.bestTime: In the north, April and June to August bring dry spells, while in the south, May offers the calmest seas and clearest water, with warm dives at 32–33°C.

uae.name: United Arab Emirates
uae.description: Wrecks, artificial reefs, and warm Persian Gulf waters.

yemen.name: Yemen
yemen.description: Socotra's legendary biodiversity and remote diving.
yemen.bestTime: March to April in Yemen features the calmest seas and clearest water, with water temperatures ranging from a pleasant 25°C to a warm 30°C.

iran.name: Iran
iran.bestTime: In September, Iran's seas calm, visibility clears, and conditions dry, with water temperatures ranging from a warm 33–34°C.

united-arab-emirates.name: United Arab Emirates
united-arab-emirates.bestTime: September presents calmest seas and clearest water, with warm temperatures peaking at 33–34°C.

pakistan.name: Pakistan
pakistan.bestTime: November to February calms the seas around Pakistan, with water temperatures dropping to a brisk 23°C.
